title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING AN ADDITIONAL SUM OF TWENTY-THREE MILLION PESOS AS COUNÂ­TERPART FUND TO CARRY OUT THE PURPOSES OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIX HUNDRED AND FOUR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4218 / 51 OG No. 7, 3351 (July, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1278, June 14, 1955 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING AN ADDITIONAL SUM OF TWENTY-THREE MILLION PESOS AS COUNÂTERPART FUND TO CARRY OUT THE PURPOSES OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIX HUNDRED AND FOUR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Section 1. The sum of twenty-three million pesos is hereby appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, as additional CounÂterpart Fund to carry out the purposes of Republic Act Numbered Six hundred and four.

Sec. 2. This appropriation shall be available for exÂpenditure until exhausted even after June thirty, nineteen hundred and fifty-seven.

Sec. 3. This Act shall take effect July first, nineteen hundred fifty-six.

Approved, June 14, 1955.
